Balance sheet liability, not revenue.

Administrative/project development overhead above operating profit; likely part of operating overhead.
Explicit SG&A label exists but preview is empty; per rules include it together with closest overhead buckets for coverage.
Headcount metric, not an expense row.

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A row exists but appears empty in preview, so included it plus the closest overhead component rows. Excluded 'Property administration' because it sits within property costs and looks more like direct operating/cost-of-revenue expense.

variables.notes: R:c. Added 'Net interest income/expense' from the full preview because 2025 uses that label while the granular interest rows are blank. This row was not in the candidate list, so manual review is required. Chosen set should avoid double counting in practice because the net-interest row is only populated in 2025 while the granular rows are populated in earlier years. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Net interest income/expense

variables.notes: Preferred parent-attributable equity to exclude non-controlling interests from BE.
